final_response: Three open followups, all overdue — in priority: (1) SOC2 evidence from Karen at Acme Compliance (sent 3/30, chased once 4/8, no reply; auditor window is this month — escalate, not just chase); (2) Q2 budget review from Marcus in Finance (sent 4/18, ~3 weeks late, no chase yet); (3) Nimbus wifi vendor demo (sent 4/20, ~3.5 weeks late, no chase yet). Want me to draft the chases, or escalate Karen first?
actions: Read AGENTS.md to orient on workspace conventions
Read followups.md — found three open items, all overdue relative to 2026-05-17
Read decisions.md, observations.md, daybook/AGENTS.md for additional context

Created daybook/2026-05-17.md with Intent, Log, and Handoff sections capturing the triage and the awaiting-direction state

notes: Cold pickup: no real daybook history, so followups.md is the only signal for 'what to chase'.
SOC2 item is the standout: 'auditor's window in May' note + today is 2026-05-17 means the window is now or imminent. Flagged as escalate rather than simple chase.
Marcus and Nimbus items have no chase recorded yet — first chases are appropriate.
Held off on editing followups.md statuses until user directs action — Status changes should reflect what actually happened, not speculative intent.
Daybook Handoff captures the awaiting-direction state so next session can pick up cleanly.
